title: quercus liboensis
intro: Quercus liboensis, also known as the Chinese corkbark oak, is a species of flowering plant in the beech family Fagaceae. It is primarily used in traditional Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Quercus liboensis include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Quercus liboensis often include decoctions or infusions made from the bark, which can be consumed as a tea to leverage its medicinal properties.
